title: SCF Annotation Event (scf_annotation_v1)
description: Non-sovereign telemetry from Spectral Cognitive Field (SCF). Emitted by SCF module, written to Channel C (run_trace), never affects sovereign state or authority.

params_hash.description: SHA256 hash of frozen SCFParams (for reproducibility)

evidence_in_count.description: Number of candidate evidence items SCF received

evidence_in_hash.description: SHA256 of sorted canonical JSON of evidence_in list (optional, for advanced audit)

evidence_out_count.description: Number of evidence items passed through SCF filter

evidence_out_hash.description: SHA256 of sorted canonical JSON of filtered evidence (optional)

coherence_summary.description: Binned coherence energy summary (to preserve determinism without raw floats)

low.description: Count of evidence with low coherence

medium.description: Count of evidence with medium coherence

high.description: Count of evidence with high coherence

symmetry_flags.description: Deterministic symmetry test results (boolean or enum flags, no floats)

all_pass.description: True if all evidence passed symmetry test

fail_count.description: Count of evidence failing symmetry test

tension_modes.description: Top eigenvalues of tension operator A_t (fixed-point integers, not floats)

memory_conflict_count.description: Number of DISPUTED/RETRACTED events in MemoryKernel (optional)

trace_anomaly_count.description: Number of anomaly events in run_trace (optional)

filtered_evidence.description: The filtered evidence list (to be submitted to TownAdapter). Each item is canonical JSON.

notes.description: Optional diagnostic notes (prose allowed, but never used for governance)
